div.style: display: -webkit-box; display: flex; -webkit-box-pack: justify; -ms-flex-pack: justify; justify-content: space-between; -webkit-align-self: center; align-self: center;height:65px;

td.name: td_engineer
td.style: border-right:1px solid black;border-left:1px solid black; border-top:none;width: 300px !important;word-break: break-all;height:65px;
